name: SEC EDGAR
robots_policy: Use SEC APIs/RSS and respect SEC fair-access guidance.
content_license_note: Public government filings; preserve source URL and accession metadata.
notes: Primary PIT source for US public-company filings.

name: SEC Companyfacts API
robots_policy: Use published SEC API access patterns and a descriptive User-Agent.
content_license_note: Public government API; cache responses for reproducibility.
notes: Structured XBRL/facts for fundamentals and company context.
